name: craft
description: Personal Claude Code collection of opinionated, self-contained engineering skills and agents — a broad Rust skill set (ownership, concurrency, traits, performance, unsafe, errors, idioms, ecosystem, architecture, web, CLI, security, plugins, macros, fintech, cloud-native) plus language-agnostic process skills (specs, debugging, refactoring, verification, review workflow, onboarding) and code-review / architecture / security / Miri agents; multi-language over time.
